SEARCH
Package com.example.abacus_app

Class Event

java.lang.Object
com.example.abacus_app.Event
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Event extends Object implements Serializable
Entity class representing an Event in the system. Contains information about the event details, registration period, capacity limits, and organizer settings.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Himesh
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Event

      public Event()

    • Event

      public Event(String eventId, String title, String description, String organizerId, com.google.firebase.Timestamp registrationStart, com.google.firebase.Timestamp registrationEnd, Integer waitlistCapacity, Integer eventCapacity, boolean geoRequired)
      Constructs a new Event with mandatory fields.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The unique ID generated by Firestore.
      title - The name of the event.
      description - Detailed information about the event.
      organizerId - The ID of the organizer who created it.
      registrationStart - When entrants can start joining the waitlist.
      registrationEnd - When registration closes.
      waitlistCapacity - Max entrants allowed (null if unlimited).
      geoRequired - Whether entrants must provide geolocation.

      Returns:
